title: Moddedbebcraft
description: An overly optimised Adventure /  Create based modpack. Release 3.2.0 out now!
body:
## What is ModdedBeBcraft (3.x.x)?

ModdedBeBcraft is a modpack made for me and my friends' minecraft server, though you can use it for yourself if you like.

Moddedbebcraft is a create based modpack, featuring world generation mods and many QoL mods.
Explore new worlds to your hearts content and create wonderful machines and builds while also having the best performance possible!

## Installation

The most recent version of ModdedBeBcraft requires fabric 0.16.9 for Minecraft 1.20.1, you can download it [here](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/).

If you haven't already, you also need to install Java.
I recommend using GraalVM for Java 17, you can get it [here](https://www.graalvm.org/downloads).

For installing the modpack itself I strongly recommend installing a third-party launcher, like Prism Launcher, AT Launcher or the Modrinth App (though I believe the latter doesn't support Curseforge mods).
You can get Prism Launcher [here](https://prismlauncher.org/download/).

## Credits

The base of this modpack uses the optimisations from Hypersoop's Simply Optimised.
All mods are not made by me, I just assembled them in one pack. Credits go to the brilliant creators of the featured mods.
